Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x3B9B "CITADEL-9000-3B9B" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $9000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Citadel.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $9000 which copies 512 bytes of data from $9050 down to $0100 so that the dump can start at $0400. It then jumps to the entry point at $3B9B (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the boot code).
Note: to dump, set a breakpoint at $2E - the second part of the init routine placed at $9000 was taken from $2E - $51, which sets various IO registers and sets the stack pointer before jumping to the games entry point.
